display_name.description: User defined name of this policy tag. It must: be unique within the parent taxonomy; contain only unicode letters, numbers, underscores, dashes and spaces; not start or end with spaces; and be at most 200 bytes long when encoded in UTF-8.

taxonomy.description: Taxonomy the policy tag is associated with

description.description: Description of this policy tag. It must: contain only unicode characters, tabs, newlines, carriage returns and page breaks; and be at most 2000 bytes long when encoded in UTF-8. If not set, defaults to an empty description. If not set, defaults to an empty description.

parent_policy_tag.description: Resource name of this policy tag's parent policy tag. If empty, it means this policy tag is a top level policy tag. If not set, defaults to an empty string.
